title: Factors in R: Creation, Structure, and Manipulation
description: A visual breakdown of R factors, showing their creation from vectors, internal integer storage structure, level relationships, and common manipulation functions.
relationships: Character Vector is processed by factor() Function
factor() Function creates Integer Storage with Levels Attribute
Levels Attribute maps integers to character labels
factor() with ordered=TRUE creates Ordered Factor
Manipulation Functions modify Levels Attribute and ordering
